chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT, COURT MIRPURKHAS Before: JUSTICE ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON. JUSTICE RIAZAT ALI SAHAR. C.P No.D-776 of 2025 Petitioners: Mumtaz Ali & others in person. Respondents: Through Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, Assistant Advocate General. Date of hearing: 24.12.2025. Date of decision: 24.12.2025. ADNAN-UL-KARIM MEMON, J. The petitioners, namely Mumtaz Ali, Waheed, Khalid Hussain, Khuda Bux, and Muhammad Yasheen, have filed the present constitutional petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, seeking a direction to the official respondents to implement the recommendations of the District Recruitment Committee, made in pursuance of orders passed by the Supreme Court of Pakistan as well as this Court. It is contended by the learned counsel that the concerned Municipal Committee has shown reluctance in complying with the directions of this Court issued vide orders dated 10.10.2024 and 17.10.2024 passed in C.P. No. D-176/2023 and connected matters. It is further stated that the District Selection Committee convened a meeting on 20.11.2024 and recommended 65 candidates, including the petitioners, for appointment against the reserved 5% quota for differently-abled persons in various departments of the Government of Sindh, District Umerkot. A perusal of the minutes of the meeting reflects that the names of the petitioners were duly recommended by the competent Chairman. The Chairman of the concerned Union Council, being a member of the Committee, was present during the meeting; therefore, no objection can be raised regarding the recommendations made. Be that as it may, without touching the merits of the case the petition is disposed of in terms of the orders passed by this

The Chairman of the concerned Union Council, being a member of the Committee, was present during the meeting; therefore, no objection can be raised regarding the recommendations made. Be that as it may, without touching the merits of the case the petition is disposed of in terms of the orders passed by this 2 Court as well as by the Supreme Court of Pakistan. The competent authority and the official respondents are hereby directed to implement the recommendations of the District Recruitment Committee and appoint the petitioners within a period of two weeks on the posts based on the quota reserved for differently abled persons. In case of non-compliance, appropriate action shall be initiated in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Adnan Ashraf Nizamani
